alkylation reagent: the ECM proteins were solubilized in 8 M urea solutions containing 1% ProteaseMAX (Promega), subjected to Dithiothreitol (DTT) reduction, iodoacetamide (IAA) alkylation, trypsin digestion, followed by LC-MS/MS.
cleavage agent: iodoacetamide (IAA) alkylation, trypsin digestion, followed by LC-MS/MS.
instrument: The DHBA-coated slides were analyzed using a Bruker SolariX 9.4T MALDI FTICR mass spectrometer.
ionization type: analyzed using a Bruker SolariX 9.4T MALDI FTICR mass spectrometer.
labeling: mass spectrometry (MS) analysis of the metabolites collected within the gels as described in the methods.
reduction reagent: iodoacetamide (IAA) alkylation, trypsin digestion, followed by LC-MS/MS.
